personal.name: Your Name
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
personal.summary: Passionate full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-powered solutions. I specialize in modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems and have a strong interest in machine learning and natural language processing. I thrive on solving complex problems and delivering clean, maintainable code.

experience.description: Lead developer for the company's flagship SaaS product serving 50K+ users. Architected a microservices backend, built a real-time collaboration feature, and reduced page load times by 60%. Mentored a team of 4 junior developers.

Core developer at an early-stage startup. Built the MVP from scratch, implemented payment integration with Stripe, and developed an AI-powered recommendation engine that increased user engagement by 35%.
Developed responsive websites and web applications for diverse clients. Delivered 20+ projects on time and within budget. Gained experience in client communication and agile methodologies.

projects.name: AI Portfolio Chat
projects.description: A modern portfolio website with an AI-powered chatbot that answers questions about the owner using RAG-style grounding with Google Gemini API.

projects.name: CollabBoard
projects.description: Real-time collaborative whiteboard application with drawing tools, sticky notes, and video chat integration. Supports up to 50 concurrent users per room.

projects.name: SmartRecipe
projects.description: AI-powered recipe suggestion app that generates personalized meal plans based on dietary preferences, available ingredients, and nutritional goals.

projects.name: DevMetrics
projects.description: Developer productivity analytics dashboard that integrates with GitHub, Jira, and Slack to provide insights on team performance and code quality metrics.

education.description: Graduated with honors. Focus on software engineering and artificial intelligence. Senior thesis on natural language processing for code generation.

careerGoals: I aim to transition into a leadership role where I can combine my technical expertise with team management. I'm particularly interested in building AI-powered products that make technology more accessible. Long-term, I want to contribute to open-source AI tools and mentor the next generation of developers.
